nasb.text: The third commander of the army for the third month was Benaiah, the son of Jehoiada the priest, as chief; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: The third commander, for the third month, was Benaiah, the son of Jehoiada the chief priest; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 三月第三班的軍長是大祭司耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 祭司耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅负责第三班，在三月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
